Location

Specialist Clinic in Kondapur, Hyderabad.

Expert specialist care in the heart of Hyderabad. Located at Kondapur Main Road, 2nd Floor, Kondapur -- easily accessible from Kondapur and surrounding areas.

Your trusted Neurology clinic in Hyderabad

Led by Dr Arjun Reddy, a Consultant Neurologist with 9+ years of experience and over 10K+ patients treated. The clinic offers comprehensive services from consultation to treatment and rehabilitation.

Located at Plot 45, 2nd Floor, Kondapur Main Road, Kondapur -- one of Hyderabad's most accessible and well-connected healthcare hubs.

MigraineEpilepsyStrokeEEG TestNerve Conduction StudyBotox for Migraine
Clinic Details

Everything you need to know.

Address

Plot 45, 2nd Floor, Kondapur Main Road, Kondapur, Hyderabad

Get Directions &rarr;

Working Hours

Mon-Sat . 9:00 AM - 7:00 PM

Parking

Bike and car parking available on Street No. 1 outside the building.

Appointments

By appointment preferred. Walk-ins accepted subject to availability. Emergency cases seen immediately.

Dr Arjun Reddy -- MBBS . MD General Medicine . DM Neurology. 9+ years of experience specialising in Migraine Treatment, Epilepsy Management, Stroke Rehabilitation.
